limitations: No quantified AI-attributable dollar amounts or headcount figures found in the excerpts; AI investment intensity capped at 3 due to absence of quantified spend.

Narrative concreteness scored 4 based on named deployed use cases (automated agents, personalization, RFID Smart Package) with operational detail, but no quantified business results (e.g., cost savings, efficiency %) are explicitly tied to AI specifically.

Risk disclosure scored 4 due to named company-specific risk mechanisms (data breach, operational vulnerabilities, inaccurate AI outputs) and a named governance body (Risk Committee), but no quantified risk exposure or formal mitigation program metrics are disclosed.
